signal: Agent ends without calling publish-session after long build-structure or content runs (safety-net fired 3/5 ticks in G1); Step 6 in architect.agent.md lacked emphatic terminal language
expected_impact: -2 to -3 safety-net entries per generation; prevents premature replanting

signal: Agent ran plan-roadmap (19 turns) then stopped without proceeding to Execute, producing a safety-net tick with only a ROADMAP.md change and no content
expected_impact: -1 partial wasted run per generation; prevents roadmap-only safety-net ticks

observed_in: G1 run 10 (check-lifecycle saw 4 ticks including 2 safety-nets → replanted at tick 4 vs 3 real ticks)
signal: Safety-net entries are counted as real ticks by check-lifecycle, inflating the generation tick counter and causing replant to fire one tick early
expected_impact: check-lifecycle could distinguish safety-net entries from real ticks and only count real ticks toward replant_after_ticks
